apps.name: Steam
apps.summary: Valve's game store, library and launcher with Proton compatibility for running Windows games on Linux.

apps.name: Heroic Games Launcher
apps.summary: Open-source launcher for Epic Games, GOG and Amazon Prime Gaming libraries on Windows and Linux.

apps.name: Lutris
apps.summary: Open-source game manager for Linux that installs and runs games across many platforms and Wine.

apps.name: Prism Launcher
apps.summary: Open-source Minecraft launcher for managing multiple instances, mods and mod loaders like Fabric and Forge.

apps.name: RetroArch
apps.summary: Open-source frontend for emulators, game engines and media players via the libretro core API.

apps.name: itch
apps.summary: Open-source desktop app for downloading, installing and updating games and software from itch.io.

apps.name: Bottles
apps.summary: Open-source Wine prefix manager for running Windows software and games on Linux in sandboxed environments.

apps.name: ProtonUp-Qt
apps.summary: Open-source GUI to install and manage GE-Proton and Wine-GE compatibility tools for Steam and Lutris.

apps.name: GOG Galaxy
apps.summary: GOG's DRM-free game client that combines multiple game libraries and platforms into one launcher.

apps.name: Epic Games Launcher
apps.summary: Epic's free client for the Epic Games Store, Fortnite and Unreal Engine downloads.
